text: ‚ôęI don't want a lot for Christmas‚ôę

‚ôęI won't even stay awake to hear those magic reindeer click‚ôę
‚ôę'Cause I just want you here tonight‚ôę
‚ôęHolding on to me so tight‚ôę
‚ôęWhat more can I do?‚ôę
‚ôęOh, baby, all I want for Christmas is you‚ôę
‚ôęYou, baby‚ôę
‚ôęOh-oh, all the lights are shining so brightly everywhere (so brightly, baby)‚ôę

‚ôęI hear those sleigh bells ringing‚ôę

‚ôęWon't you please bring my baby to me?‚ôę
